location.name: Access Point
location.description: Commercial development with 4 office towers, 10 floors each

travel_times.note: All times in minutes, distances in km. Comparison with HPTU Actual (Calle 58, downtown Medellin)

to_rionegro.note: Matrix vs route discrepancy: matrix=58.8min, direct route=48.2min. Matrix includes traffic estimation.

to_aeropuerto_jmc.note: Large discrepancy: matrix=77.3min vs route=41.5min. Matrix destination coordinates differ from direct route endpoint.

comparison_ap_vs_hptu.summary: Access Point is faster to Caldas (-17.8min), Carmen de Viboral (-17.8min), and Guarne (-14.3min). HPTU Actual is faster to Envigado (-18.1min), Marinilla (-15.8min), La Ceja (-9.7min), and Aeropuerto JMC (-9.7min). To Rionegro they are nearly equal (+1.7min).

15min.approximate_reach: Central El Poblado, parts of Envigado norte, Av Las Palmas corridor up to km ~12

30min.approximate_reach: All of El Poblado, Envigado, most of southern Medellin, Guarne approaches, parts of Oriente corridor

45min.approximate_reach: Greater Medellin metro, Rionegro approaches, La Ceja approaches, Caldas, Sabaneta

60min.approximate_reach: Full Oriente antioqueno, Rionegro, Marinilla, La Ceja, Carmen de Viboral, Guatape approaches, Copacabana, Bello

competitors_5km.source: Google Places API + OSM Overpass API

hospitals_google_places.name: Medical and Dental Center Colmedica El Poblado
Spa Medica - Dr. Juan Mario Escobar

doctors_google_places.name: Balon Gastrico - Grupo de Obesidad Clinica Medellin
Dr Felipe Martinez Restrepo - Cirujano Plastico

competitors_5km.competitive_summary: Nearest hospital-grade facility is Bluecare at 1.46km. Major hospital cluster around Calle 7 (Clinic Medellin, Intergastro, Astorga Oncology) at ~2.1-2.2km. Torre Medica El Tesoro at 2.36km is the most relevant competitor for premium health services. No hospital currently exists at Km 7 of Las Palmas, creating a gap in the corridor.

densidad_norma_adicional.note: Data available for Barrio Colombia (70 viv/ha) but specific Altos del Poblado additional density requires further search

lotes_potenciales.note: Lots in Altos del Poblado classified as NOT potential for development in 2012 data, with R_Calif=Bajo-Bajo, 0 pisos, and area lots 0-120m2

san_lucas.note: Multiple residential (multifamiliar) permits found in San Lucas

astorga.note: Building permits found for Astorga barrio

altos_del_poblado.note: At least 4 building permits found referencing Altos del Poblado

pot_data.max_floors_observed: Data shows Altos del Poblado lots with N_Pisos=0 (vacant), while the nearby areas have buildings up to 12 floors per OSM data
pot_data.note: Access Point itself (4 towers, 10 floors) is a commercial development - POT data does not specifically reference its parcel. Via Las Palmas km 7 is at the transition between urban El Poblado and the periurban Borde Suroriental zone.

growth.note: Compound annual growth rate ~5.1% over 11 years for Cat I (passenger vehicles)

traffic.km7_specific_data: NOT AVAILABLE - Toll data is aggregate for the entire Las Palmas corridor. No speed or congestion data specific to Km 7 segment found in raw data.
traffic.implications: High and growing traffic volume (~11,000+ TPD passenger vehicles in 2025) indicates strong corridor demand. Hospital at Km 7 would intercept significant daily traffic flow.

buildings_nearby.note: OSM data for El Poblado is incomplete - only 40 buildings have height/levels tags. Actual building stock is much larger. Access Point's 4 towers x 10 floors are consistent with the tallest buildings in the OSM dataset.

verified: Access Point snaps to 'Avenida de Las Palmas' in Mapbox with 26.87m snap distance - coordinates confirmed
Travel time Access Point to HPTU Actual: 18.5 min (8.8 km) - bidirectional consistency confirmed (17.8 min return)
Route to Rionegro via Conexion Vial Aburra-Oriente: 48.2 min, 30.9 km with 2 tunnels
Route to Aeropuerto JMC: 41.5 min, 27.5 km via same corridor
Las Palmas toll data spans 2014-2025 with consistent monthly granularity
Cat I (passenger) TPD grew from ~6,525 (2014) to ~11,248 (2025) = 72.4% growth
Google Places found 20 hospitals and 20 doctors within search radius
Nearest hospital-grade facility (Bluecare) at 1.46 km from Access Point
Isochrone data available for 15/30/45/60 minute contours
POT data confirms Altos del Poblado (Cod_Barrio 1408) in Comuna 14, Zone Z5, AIE MED Borde Suroriental
Building permits exist for San Lucas, Altos del Poblado, and Astorga barrios
inconsistencies: Matrix travel time to Rionegro (58.8 min) vs direct route (48.2 min) - 10.6 min discrepancy likely due to matrix using different routing profile or traffic model

Matrix travel time to Aeropuerto JMC (77.3 min) vs direct route (41.5 min) - 35.8 min discrepancy. Matrix destination coordinates (-75.264, 6.139) appear to be a point beyond the airport, explaining the difference. CRITICAL: The matrix endpoint may not be the airport terminal.

Lotes potenciales data shows Altos del Poblado parcels as 'NOT potential' with 0 floors and Bajo-Bajo classification - this seems inconsistent with the actual development (Access Point is a major commercial complex). Data may be outdated or refer to specific small parcels, not the overall zone.
OSM building heights data is sparse (only 40 buildings with levels tags in all El Poblado) - not representative of actual building stock
pending_verification: Exact POT zoning and uso del suelo for the Access Point parcel (specific CBML code unknown)

Exact property boundaries and cadastral information for the Access Point lot
Environmental permits and restrictions for Via Las Palmas corridor

Conduct peak-hour travel time study using real GPS traces or Mapbox Traffic Profile API
Obtain catastral data from IGAC/Medellin for the specific lot (area, avaluo, current use classification)
Survey Access Point building specifications (ceiling height, floor plate area, elevator capacity, parking ratio)
Request Secretaria de Salud de Medellin data on hospital bed demand in El Poblado
Analyze competitor bed counts and occupancy rates for clinics within 3km radius
Verify if the Peaje Las Palmas toll booth is located before or after Km 7 for accurate traffic volume attribution
Obtain DANE census data for the 15-minute isochrone catchment area to estimate serviceable population
Check with Acierto Inmobiliario on office vacancy rates and potential for use-change permits
